message.content:
Test file: src/claim-office.spec.ts
Failing test: "should apply loyalty discount of 20% for customer with >= 2 years"
Expected behavior: generateQuote([{type: "sword"}], {yearsWithMHPCO: 2}) returns object with basePremium of 80 (100 base - 20% loyalty = 80)
Current error: Expected 80, Received 100 (loyalty discount not applied)
Implementation file: src/claim-office.ts

Context:
- yearsWithMHPCO >= 2 → 20% discount on POLICY base premium (sum of all item base premiums)
- Customer interface already has yearsWithMHPCO
- Policy-wide modifier (not per-item)

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, proceed to Refactor after completion.

content.text: Let me read the current implementation and test files.

The test expects that when `yearsWithMHPCO >= 2`, a 20% loyalty discount is applied to the policy base premium. The current implementation returns the base premium without applying any loyalty discount.

The minimal fix is to apply a 20% discount when `customer.yearsWithMHPCO >= 2`.

content.content: The file /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-10_07-09-01_claim-office-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_sonnet-4-6/src/claim-office.ts has been updated successfully.

content.text:
All 10 tests pass.

Green Phase Complete:
**Implementation**: Added a loyalty discount check after computing the base premium. When `customer.yearsWithMHPCO >= 2`, the base premium is multiplied by 0.8 (20% discount applied).
**Result**: All tests now pass (10 passing, 16 todo)
**Approach**: Minimal conditional applied at the policy level after all item-based calculations are complete. No new abstractions, no handling of edge cases beyond what the test demands.

Proceeding to Refactor phase.

Implementation file: `/home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-10_07-09-01_claim-office-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_sonnet-4-6/src/claim-office.ts`
